headline: Truist Securities Maintains Hold on Atmos Energy, Lowers Price Target to $187
summary: Truist Securities  analyst Richard Sunderland   maintains Atmos Energy (NYSE:ATO) with a Hold and lowers the price target from $195 to $187.
